title: pteris aquilina subvar. latiuscula
intro: Pteris aquilina subvar. latiuscula, also known as the broad buckler fern, is a type of fern native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The broad buckler fern has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, and its health benefits also include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Pteris aquilina subvar. latiuscula is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe and calm the body.
